net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.helper

Class MapExportHelper

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.helper.MapExportHelper

  • public class MapExportHelper
extends java.lang.Object
    This class exports the costmap and obstacle map.
    Since:
    0.6
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    marc.engelmann, michael.schmidt

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      MapExportHelper(ExcelExport exporter)
      This method saves the whole cost map in a text file to the documents folder.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void saveCostmapToFile(java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,Costmap> map, Vector dimensions)
      Save costmap to file.
      void saveObstacleToFile(Areamap areamap, Vector dimensions)
      This method saves the whole obstacle map in a text file to the documents folder.

    • Constructor Detail

      • MapExportHelper

        public MapExportHelper(ExcelExport exporter)
        This method saves the whole cost map in a text file to the documents folder.
        Parameters:
        exporter - the exporter

    • Method Detail

      • saveCostmapToFile

        public final void saveCostmapToFile(java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,Costmap> map,
                                    Vector dimensions)
                             throws java.io.IOException,
                                    java.io.FileNotFoundException
        Save costmap to file.
        Parameters:
        map - the map
        dimensions - the dimensions
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Signals that an I/O exception has occurred.
        java.io.FileNotFoundException - the file not found exception

      • saveObstacleToFile

        public final void saveObstacleToFile(Areamap areamap,
                                     Vector dimensions)
                              throws java.io.IOException,
                                     java.io.FileNotFoundException
        This method saves the whole obstacle map in a text file to the documents folder.
        Parameters:
        areamap - the areamap
        dimensions - the dimensions
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Signals that an I/O exception has occurred.
        java.io.FileNotFoundException - the file not found exception
